name: triggered_overrides_unlocked_state
description: is_triggered=True overrides everything: stop_trigger_level == TRIGGERED_OVERRIDE_LEVEL (-999.0). State (hold_ticks, breakeven_locked) still evolves normally; ONLY stop_trigger_level is overridden.
derivation: dynamic_activation = 1.0. threshold = 0.8. current_return (0.5) < 0.8 -> ticks RESET to 0. 0 < 5 -> not locked. is_triggered=True -> stop_trigger_level = TRIGGERED_OVERRIDE_LEVEL = -999.0 (overrides the would-be base -0.3). Confirms the override path on the not-locked branch.
